name: Glacier Lake Resources Inc.
summary: Glacier Lake Resources Inc. acquires and explores for resource properties in Canada. The company primarily explores for silver, copper, lead, zinc, and gold deposits. It holds interest in the Silver Star, and the Hackett and North Wolverine properties located in British Columbia. The company was formerly known as Killdeer Minerals Inc. and changed its name to Glacier Lake Resources Inc. in February 2017. Glacier Lake Resources Inc. was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
